---
title: "mask_tensor"
generated: true
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:mask_tensor -->
```python
mask_tensor(tensor: Shaped[Array, ...], mask: Bool[Array, ...], axis: Sequence[int], fill_value: Union[float, Shaped[Array, ...]] = 0) -> Shaped[Array, ...]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:mask_tensor -->
*TODO: write an overview.*
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:mask_tensor -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `tensor` | `Shaped[Array, ...]` | — | — | — |
| `mask` | `Bool[Array, ...]` | — | — | — |
| `axis` | `Sequence[int]` | — | — | — |
| `fill_value` | `Union[float, Shaped[Array, ...]]` | — | `0` | — |

**Returns** `Shaped[Array, ...]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
